BatchRefundResource.instanceIds: List of instance IDs, up to 20 instances per operation
BatchRefundResource.relatedReleaseFlag: Whether to release associated EIPs and data disks at the time of instance release. Default: false. Note: prepaid CDS disks associated with the instance will be forcibly released with it.
BatchRefundResource.deleteCdsSnapshotFlag: Whether to release cloud disk snapshots. Default: false, not released.
BatchRefundResource.deleteRelatedEnisFlag: Whether to delete associated ENIs when the instance is released. Default: false, not deleted.
